title: peristylus australis
intro: Peristylus australis, a species of orchid native to Australia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The medicinal properties of Peristylus australis include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Peristylus australis is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine for centuries.
